tech_news.title: 45-year-old man caught hiding in Best Buy overnight to be early Pokemon card release - Dexerto
tech_news.description: A California man has been arrested ahead of a Pokemon card release at Best Buy after he found a way to stay in the store overnight once it closed.

tech_news.title: The most severe Linux threat to surface in years catches the world flat-footed - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: CopyFail threatens multi-tenant servers, CI/CD work flows, Kubernetes containers, and more.

tech_news.title: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.

tech_news.title: Xbox Mode Begins Rolling Out to Players on Windows 11 PCs Today - Xbox Wire
tech_news.description: Beginning today, we’re excited to share that Xbox mode will begin rolling out to Windows 11 PCs, bringing a console-inspired Xbox experience to more players than ever.

tech_news.title: Apex Legends Season 29 patch notes: New Legend Axle, Deathbox Respawns, buffs and nerfs - Dexerto
tech_news.description: Here’s everything coming to Season 29 of Apex Legends, including a new hypermobile legend, changes to respawns, and tweaks to existing legends.

tech_news.title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

tech_news.title: Apple execs to talk China and tariffs, but will avoid discussing foldable iPhone, per traders on Kalshi - CNBC
tech_news.description: Apple is set to report earnings after the bell on Thursday, with its conference call scheduled for 5:00 pm ET.

tech_news.title: April Xbox Update: Customize Your Console, Manually Add Your Favorite Games on PC, and More - Xbox Wire
tech_news.description: The April Xbox Update is rolling out today featuring an array of improvements for console, PC, mobile, and more.

tech_news.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City Review - IGN
tech_news.description: This empty shell of an adventure falls short of realizing the awesome potential of being the turtle bros in VR.

tech_news.title: Wizards of the Coast Is Making a Brand New Trading Card Game - Gizmodo
tech_news.description: Almost 30 years in the making, 'Mood Swings' wants to deliver a smaller, quicker, and more accessible card game experience that not even 'Magic: The Gathering' can provide.
